prompt: Our company makes ruggedized laptop computers for military use. Are we subject to ITAR? Do we need to register with DDTC? Walk me through how to determine if our product is on the USML.

assertions.text: Explains the USML enumeration test and specially designed test (22 CFR 120.41)
References relevant USML categories (Cat XI military electronics, or Cat VIII if airborne)
Explains DDTC registration requirement under 22 CFR 122.1 for manufacturers of defense articles
Mentions Commodity Jurisdiction (CJ) as the path to get an official DDTC determination
Cites specific CFR sections (22 CFR Parts 120-122) in the response
